result.preview:
"Postgres query exectution error (ProgrammingError): (psycopg2.errors.UndefinedFunction) operator does not exist: text - text
LINE 1: ...T c.ownerid, AVG(EXTRACT(EPOCH FROM (c.closeddate - c.create...
                                                             ^
HINT:  No operator matches the given name and argument types. You might need to add explicit type casts.

[SQL: SELECT c.ownerid, AVG(EXTRACT(EPOCH FROM (c.closeddate - c.createddate))) AS avg_handle_time_seconds FROM "Case" c JOIN ( SELECT caseid__c, COUNT(*) AS owner_assignment_count FROM casehistory__c WHERE field__c = 'Owner Assignment' GROUP BY caseid__c HAVING COUNT(*) = 1 ) AS non_transferred_cases ON c.id = non_transferred_cases.caseid__c WHERE c.createddate >= '2023-05-02'::date AND c.closeddate IS NOT NULL GROUP BY c.ownerid HAVING COUNT(c.id) > 1 ORDER BY avg_handle_time_seconds ASC LIMIT 1;]
(Background on this error at: https://sqlalche.me/e/20/f405)"

args.query: SELECT c.ownerid, AVG(EXTRACT(EPOCH FROM (c.closeddate - c.createddate))) AS avg_handle_time_seconds FROM "Case" c JOIN ( SELECT caseid__c, COUNT(*) AS owner_assignment_count FROM casehistory__c WHERE field__c = 'Owner Assignment' GROUP BY caseid__c HAVING COUNT(*) = 1 ) AS non_transferred_cases ON c.id = non_transferred_cases.caseid__c WHERE c.createddate >= '2023-05-02'::date AND c.closeddate IS NOT NULL GROUP BY c.ownerid HAVING COUNT(c.id) > 1 ORDER BY avg_handle_time_seconds ASC LIMIT 1;

args.query: SELECT c.ownerid, AVG(EXTRACT(EPOCH FROM (c.closeddate::timestamp - c.createddate::timestamp))) AS avg_handle_time_seconds FROM "Case" c JOIN ( SELECT caseid__c, COUNT(*) AS owner_assignment_count FROM casehistory__c WHERE field__c = 'Owner Assignment' GROUP BY caseid__c HAVING COUNT(*) = 1 ) AS non_transferred_cases ON c.id = non_transferred_cases.caseid__c WHERE c.createddate::timestamp >= '2023-05-02'::date AND c.closeddate IS NOT NULL GROUP BY c.ownerid HAVING COUNT(c.id) > 1 ORDER BY avg_handle_time_seconds ASC LIMIT 1;

args.query: SELECT caseid__c, field__c, COUNT(*) FROM casehistory__c GROUP BY caseid__c, field__c LIMIT 10;

exec_args.sql: SELECT caseid__c, field__c, COUNT(*) FROM casehistory__c GROUP BY caseid__c, field__c LIMIT 10;

args.query: SELECT id, ownerid, createddate, closeddate FROM "Case" WHERE createddate::timestamp >= '2023-05-02'::date AND closeddate IS NOT NULL LIMIT 10;

exec_args.sql: SELECT id, ownerid, createddate, closeddate FROM "Case" WHERE createddate::timestamp >= '2023-05-02'::date AND closeddate IS NOT NULL LIMIT 10;

args.query: SELECT c.ownerid, AVG(EXTRACT(EPOCH FROM (REPLACE(c.closeddate, '#', '')::timestamp - REPLACE(c.createddate, '#', '')::timestamp))) AS avg_handle_time_seconds FROM "Case" c JOIN ( SELECT REPLACE(caseid__c, '#', '') AS cleaned_caseid, COUNT(*) AS owner_assignment_count FROM casehistory__c WHERE field__c = 'Owner Assignment' GROUP BY REPLACE(caseid__c, '#', '') HAVING COUNT(*) = 1 ) AS non_transferred_cases ON REPLACE(c.id, '#', '') = non_transferred_cases.cleaned_caseid WHERE REPLACE(c.createddate, '#', '')::timestamp >= '2023-05-02'::date AND c.closeddate IS NOT NULL GROUP BY c.ownerid HAVING COUNT(c.id) > 1 ORDER BY avg_handle_time_seconds ASC LIMIT 1;

exec_args.sql: SELECT c.ownerid, AVG(EXTRACT(EPOCH FROM (REPLACE(c.closeddate, '#', '')::timestamp - REPLACE(c.createddate, '#', '')::timestamp))) AS avg_handle_time_seconds FROM "Case" c JOIN ( SELECT REPLACE(caseid__c, '#', '') AS cleaned_caseid, COUNT(*) AS owner_assignment_count FROM casehistory__c WHERE field__c = 'Owner Assignment' GROUP BY REPLACE(caseid__c, '#', '') HAVING COUNT(*) = 1 ) AS non_transferred_cases ON REPLACE(c.id, '#', '') = non_transferred_cases.cleaned_caseid WHERE REPLACE(c.createddate, '#', '')::timestamp >= '2023-05-02'::date AND c.closeddate IS NOT NULL GROUP BY c.ownerid HAVING COUNT(c.id) > 1 ORDER BY avg_handle_time_seconds ASC LIMIT 1;
